channel.title: navy.mil News (sample)
channel.description: Sample navy.mil feed for offline scraper testing.

item.title: Navy deploys autonomous unmanned surface vessel on operational patrol
item.description: An AI-piloted unmanned surface vessel was deployed for its first operational patrol in the fleet.

item.title: Machine learning predictive maintenance tested aboard destroyer
item.description: The Navy tested a machine learning predictive-maintenance algorithm to forecast component failures.

item.title: Sailors compete in annual fitness challenge
item.description: Crews across the fleet competed in a shipboard fitness challenge this weekend.
